# Filtration Analysis

**Summary**: The study of how fluids and solids pass through a porous medium.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2001-mohammed|Mohammed, 2001]] performed filtration analysis to determine the impact of particle size on invasion depth.

- [[2011-sanmi|Sanmi, 2011]] performed HTHP filtration tests to assess the mud's ability to maintain wellbore integrity.

## Instruments and Software



- [[2011-sanmi|Sanmi, 2011]] performed HTHP filtration tests to assess the mud's ability to maintain wellbore integrity.

## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- Leak-off experiments showed that larger CaCO3 particles reduced the depth of filtrate penetration. ([[2001-mohammed|Mohammed, 2001, p. 107]])

- The developed OBM met requirements for HTHP filtration loss, comparable to synthetic systems. ([[2011-sanmi|Sanmi, 2011, p. 11]])
